Category.title: Category
Category.description: A shoot list category document detailing video items and statuses

TimelineDay.title: TimelineDay
TimelineDay.description: A production timeline day detailing status and scheduled tasks

Stall.title: Stall
Stall.description: An interactive coordinate stall or commercial food/beverage/merch anchor detailing vendor placements and payments

GeneralTask.title: GeneralTask
GeneralTask.description: A general custom task in the production checklist with status and due date

MapMarker.title: MapMarker
MapMarker.description: An interactive coordinate stall or performance anchor on the layout map

MapCategory.title: MapCategory
MapCategory.description: A custom layout category added by the planner

RequirementCategory.title: RequirementCategory
RequirementCategory.description: A category grouping specific physical equipment or logistics requests

/categories/{categoryId}.description: Collection of shoot list video item categories

/stalls/{stallId}.description: Collection of commercial vendor stall items, payment records, and ledger values

/general_tasks/{taskId}.description: Collection of production general todo items

/map_categories/{catId}.description: Collection of planner custom category records

/event_requirements/{reqId}.description: Collection of event logistics and material requirement categories
